name: io.github.Servosity/veeam-mcp
title: Veeam VSPC MCP
description: Sync Veeam Service Provider Console tenants to local SQLite; cross-company backup answers offline.

environmentVariables.name: VEEAM_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Your VSPC appliance REST API base URL, e.g. https://vspc.example.com:1280/api/v3 (per-instance).

environmentVariables.name: VEEAM_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for the VSPC REST API (POST /token with your portal credentials).
